author: y4rr
content: Delivered closed-form TransformedDistribution::entropy in c6f09cb45b. AffineTransform contributes log|scale| (constant; chains sum via ComposeTransform), ExpTransform contributes base.mean() (E_X[X]). Sigmoid/Tanh/Softplus/multi-Exp now return precise InvalidArgument naming the blocking transforms instead of a blanket 'not implemented'. Discriminating fixture transformed_normal_affine added to pin script + verify harness + Rust dump; entropy matches torch's analytic equivalent Normal(2,3).entropy() byte-tight (max_abs=0.000e+00, tol 1e-4). Evidence: 375 lib tests pass, clippy --all-targets clean.
